name: usw
description: Run standalone USW workflows with optional OpenSpec compatibility.

interface.longDescription: Initializes a standalone USW workspace, orchestrates Analysis, Development and Testing scenarios, preserves evidence and review receipts, and optionally integrates with OpenSpec through explicit configuration.
defaultPrompt: Run /usw-init to create a standalone workspace, use usw-run-flow for explicit role scenarios, and use /usw-handoff before a pause.
